feed.title: UserScripts
feed.subtitle: Combined userscript-ecosystem feed: Greasespot (Greasemonkey blog), Sleazyfork (latest updated scripts), ScriptCat (newest scripts + app changelog), the Violentmonkey blog, and the Tampermonkey changelog.

entry.title: 防 Claude 检测（模拟新加坡） — aidenlee1994
entry.content: 伪装新加坡浏览器：隐藏中文字体 + 伪造区域 + 指纹噪声
entry.dc:creator: ScriptCat

entry.title: 智慧课程自动刷课助手 — Jyunia
entry.content: 自动播放视频、视频倍速、自动回答弹窗题目、智能下一节
entry.dc:creator: ScriptCat

entry.title: 纷享开发者助手 — addyu
entry.content: 纷享销客开发者助手，列表页显示数据Id及关联数据Id；AI Hub签到辅助
entry.dc:creator: ScriptCat

entry.title: 纷享iPaaS增强工具 — addyu
entry.content: 批量删除|新标签页打开
entry.dc:creator: ScriptCat

entry.title: 武汉讯网网课自动切换下一节 (精准DOM提取版) — Jruing
entry.content: 监控课程播放进度，通过DOM精准提取时间，相等时自动跳转到下一节
entry.dc:creator: ScriptCat

entry.title: 武汉讯网在线课程自动答题（自用） — Jruing
entry.content: 监控 practise.do 接口拿答案，自动选择、点击确定并点击关闭，用于开发者测试
entry.dc:creator: ScriptCat

entry.title: 知乎美化整合版（展开/折叠 + 宽屏/侧边栏/顶栏/图片高度） — quellan
entry.content: 默认折叠；点击左外侧空白切换展开/折叠，收起时回到展开前锚点 + 背景闪动；菜单可开关宽屏、移除侧边栏、隐藏顶栏、调整图片高度。
entry.dc:creator: ScriptCat

entry.title: 上海开放大学助手 — ttt132132
entry.content: 上海开放大学网上学习助手：自动识别课程任务、顺序导航、必看视频播放辅助，理清网课学习进度。仅供学习交流。
entry.dc:creator: ScriptCat

entry.title: 全局强制虚拟定位（双重 Hook + 微抖动 + 状态回显） — Thelittleprince
entry.content: Hook getCurrentPosition + watchPosition，强制返回虚拟坐标；中国视图地图选点 + 状态栏回显 + 星号收藏夹
entry.dc:creator: ScriptCat

entry.title: InfiniteCanvas Turbo — oocc00
entry.content: FPS+节点统计 · 菜单开关 · G网格 T性能 H隐藏图 L连线 O列表 C链高亮 F搜索 X专注 · 主题 · 圆角 · DOM虚拟化
entry.dc:creator: ScriptCat

entry.title: 庆阳继续教育自动看视频 — jiuzhoufx
entry.content: 自动播放庆阳专技继续教育平台视频，支持后台播放、静音、自动小节切换、弹窗处理、防误跳
entry.dc:creator: ScriptCat

entry.title: 中华医学远程继续教育课程视频自动播放与下一集跳转 — DF11G2001
entry.content: 打开课程视频后自动播放；若被浏览器阻止，点击页面任意处即开始；视频结束后自动跳转下一集
entry.dc:creator: ScriptCat

entry.title: 鐢靛晢姣斾环鍔╂墜 - 鍘嗗彶浠锋牸鏌ヨ — 都张
entry.content: 娣樺疂/浜笢/鎷煎澶?1688鍟嗗搧鍘嗗彶浠锋牸鏌ヨ锛屼竴閿悳绱㈠悓娆炬渶浣庝环锛岃嚜鍔ㄩ闅愯棌浼樻儬鍒?// @author SmartTools
entry.dc:creator: ScriptCat

entry.title: MultiMirror Download (HuggingFace + ComfyUI) — oocc00
entry.content: Add hf-mirror (yellow) and ModelScope (purple) download buttons to Hugging Face file pages and the ComfyUI missing-model panel, plus a folder-open shortcut.
entry.dc:creator: ScriptCat

entry.title: LibTV Canvas Boost — oocc00
entry.content: 性能优化 · G网格 T性能 H隐藏 L连线 C全链 F搜索 P提示词 X专注 R直角 ?帮助 · AI增强 · 标签 · 提示词模板 · 模板变量 · 主题(画布配色DIY)
entry.dc:creator: ScriptCat

entry.title: L站划词Base64解码工具 — wilsons
entry.content: 划词后自动删除汉字、中文标点和Emoji，尝试Base64解码后，再次尝试清理并自动复制
entry.dc:creator: ScriptCat

entry.title: 教师教育服务平台，教师教育网-课程助手 — zzzzzzys
entry.content: 教师教育服务平台，教师教育网-课程助手（https://px.teacheredu.cn/），脚本免费功能有限，可自动静音播放视频，防暂停。更全更快更自动方法，建议升级至客户端请查看文档介绍！
entry.dc:creator: ScriptCat

entry.title: 🚀超星智学助手|无需配置|AI答题|不限次永久使用|稳定服务 — struct
entry.content: 🚀超星智学助手，采用AI大模型驱动，支持智能答题、课程学习辅助等功能。简洁界面、稳定服务，持续适配平台更新。
entry.dc:creator: ScriptCat

entry.title: 图寻黑白主题插件 — function_at
entry.content: 美化图寻默认界面
entry.dc:creator: ScriptCat

entry.title: 学习通题目导出（题库版） — daerduolanglang
entry.content: 【9.15】新增题库查看、整题编辑、手动添加、匹配阈值可调
entry.dc:creator: ScriptCat

entry.title: Thpilot AI 划词助手 — wilsons
entry.content: 通用网页划词助手：任意网页划词解释、翻译、纠错、总结和连续聊天
entry.dc:creator: ScriptCat

entry.title: 医真云终审医师快捷键1.0 — Ethanwang0830
entry.content: Alt+Q 切换首项正式模板；Alt+E 提交终审并自动打开下一例检查
entry.dc:creator: ScriptCat

entry.title: 医真云快捷提交模板5.0 — Ethanwang0830
entry.content: Alt+`完整流程；Alt+1阴性提交+下一位；Alt+2阳性提交+下一位；Alt+3切换临时模板→选阳性→提交打印临时报告
entry.dc:creator: ScriptCat

entry.title: Steam 创意工坊Mod下载工具 - 模组ID批量提取与导出 — godsq
entry.content: 悬浮海报按钮(复制ID/SteamCMD/收藏到收藏夹)；收藏面板(批量收藏)；列表管理器(搜索/排序/批量导出)；全工坊页面自动识别
entry.dc:creator: ScriptCat

entry.title: 日期验证，自用 — shuake345
entry.content: 日期验证，自用..验证
entry.dc:creator: ScriptCat

entry.title: Bluesky Translator — NemoKing
entry.content: Translate Bluesky posts in place on bsky.app
entry.dc:creator: ScriptCat

entry.title: ✨智学星学习通 - 超星学习通网课作业助手 — educa
entry.content: 智学星，专为超星学习通打造的智能学习助手。🤖AI大模型答题、题库缓存 / 本地答案库，🥇支持题目Word导出，带样式排版，方便打印复习，模拟真人行为，视频音频自动挂机、章节测验一键完成，一键安装即用，自动切换任务点，作业考试自动答题提交。极简设计、极速体验。
entry.dc:creator: ScriptCat

entry.title: 【青春版】BOSS海投助手 — Yangshengzhou
entry.content: 求职工具！Yangshengzhou开发用于提高BOSS直聘投递效率，批量沟通，高效求职
entry.dc:creator: ScriptCat

entry.title: 选中文字问 ChatGPT（可拖动＋新聊天） — wilsons
entry.content: 选中文字后发送到 ChatGPT；支持补充提示词、拖动弹层，并在新聊天中提交
entry.dc:creator: ScriptCat

entry.title: Make Bilibili Better（海外优化版） — ArcherEmiya
entry.content: 优化哔哩哔哩网页体验，支持海外播放地址优化，适合留学生和海外用户观看 B 站。
entry.dc:creator: ScriptCat

entry.title: 抖音视频下载（Douyin Downloader） — ArcherEmiya
entry.content: 下载当前抖音网页视频，并支持在个人主页批量选择视频下载。
entry.dc:creator: ScriptCat

entry.title: B站楼中楼上下文｜一眼看懂这条评论在回复谁 — ArcherEmiya
entry.content: 鼠标悬停楼中楼回复，自动显示主评论、被回复评论和当前回复，解决B站评论对话断层。
entry.dc:creator: ScriptCat

entry.title: 微软积分商城签到（改进版） — happybear
entry.content: 每天在后台自动完成 Microsoft Rewards 任务获取积分奖励，✅签入、✅阅读、✅活动、✅搜索

entry.content: 【多课程版】支持一次抢多门课，按顺序依次监控。API嗅探+直连+预连接+自适应间隔。

entry.content: 快速设置叠帧范围并执行叠帧操作

entry.content: 自动翻页采集所有商品的图案链接，导出Excel

entry.content: 自动签到、异常刷新并点击第一节课、卡顿刷新

entry.content: 在 123 云盘页面，彻底阻止任何JS向剪贴板写入内容

entry.content: 检测标注物归组规范：每组1行人+1人脸+5关键点(左眼/右眼/鼻尖/左嘴角/右嘴角)

entry.title: GLaDOS 自动签到 — raymondq
entry.content: 在 GLaDOS 控制台页面自动执行签到
entry.dc:creator: ScriptCat

entry.title: CPA 凭证巡检管理（Grok/Codex） — yhlinny
entry.content: CLIProxyAPI 巡检面板：有 Key 自动加载凭证；⋯ 浮层菜单；明细表占满高度；统计白字；多选批量；建议条
entry.dc:creator: ScriptCat

entry.title: Older-Mature.net 广告清理 (Ad Cleaner) — 朱焱伟
entry.content: 隐藏右下角 video-slider 广告 (click_vl_*)、trudigo LIVE 直播 (#ajopr)、whitetrafsa LIVE 直播网格、内容区横幅。三层防御：GM_addStyle 主力 + 源头拦截广告脚本/iframe + DOM 清理兜底。
entry.dc:creator: ScriptCat

entry.title: Backloggd Plus — NemoKing
entry.content: Extends Backloggd and adds a Backloggd button on Steam game pages
entry.dc:creator: ScriptCat

entry.title: Steam GameStatus — NemoKing
entry.content: Adds extra game info from gamestatus.info on Steam store cards and game pages
entry.dc:creator: ScriptCat

entry.title: YouTube Bot Comments Filter — NemoKing
entry.content: Hides or blurs bot comments on YouTube (nickname pattern detection) with a toggle in the comments sort panel. Multilingual UI.
entry.dc:creator: ScriptCat

entry.title: GitHub GitFut — NemoKing
entry.content: Adds GitFut scouting cards on GitHub profiles and avatar hovercards
entry.dc:creator: ScriptCat

entry.title: Steam Region Block Bypass — NemoKing
entry.content: View region-blocked Steam store pages and guest search via anonymous fetch (no account cookies); optional proxy gateway
entry.dc:creator: ScriptCat

entry.title: 浏览器成就系统 — ying3477
entry.content: 监控上网行为解锁成就，并在配置的网站显示成就浮动窗。⚙️ 支持通过齿轮按钮自定义浮动窗显示网址。🐛 修复悬浮窗点击展开问题。
entry.dc:creator: ScriptCat

entry.title: 脚本健康度看板 (Script Health Dashboard) — ying3477
entry.content: 后台监控所有已安装脚本的运行状态，提供健康度评分、历史趋势、智能告警、可视化看板、版本检测、配置面板（最终完整版）
entry.dc:creator: ScriptCat

entry.title: 微博知乎B站小红书关键词屏蔽器 — dadakzt
entry.content: 屏蔽微博、知乎、小红书、B站含关键词的内容，支持自定义管理
entry.dc:creator: ScriptCat

entry.title: B站视频片段下载器 — redsage
entry.content: 在B站视频页面选择任意时间段，录制并下载指定片段到自定义文件夹
entry.dc:creator: ScriptCat

entry.title: 飞书文档/文件全能下载 — yanxue
entry.content: 合二为一：飞书 wiki/doc 导出 Word/PDF/Markdown + 飞书/讯飞文件/文件夹流式下载 PDF
entry.dc:creator: ScriptCat

entry.title: WHUT教务系统小助手 — 谢卓霖
entry.content: Shadow DOM 隔离的现代教务助手：支持成绩回填与分析、学业监测、GPA、官方证明、一键评教、主题切换和自动更新。
entry.dc:creator: ScriptCat

entry.title: 强制网页缩放 (解除UA/触摸限制) — Salute666
entry.content: 解决迅雷浏览器等修改UA为电脑版后无法缩放的问题。强制解除网页禁止缩放限制，并提供悬浮缩放按钮。
entry.dc:creator: ScriptCat

entry.title: 媒体资源深度嗅探 (M3U8/MP4 & Master多码率解析) — Salute666
entry.content: 深度嗅探网页 M3U8/MP4 链接。自动识别并展开 Master M3U8 (假链接) 的多码率列表，支持下载 M3U8 索引文件及复制专业下载命令。
entry.dc:creator: ScriptCat

entry.title: 一键评教（蚌医版） — jasminenjohn
entry.content: 教学评价一键批量打分，自动逐门评价并提交
entry.dc:creator: ScriptCat

entry.title: 小号切换器 — xcv2
entry.content: 多账号切换 | localStorage + Cookie (GM_cookie) | 直接存储对象，分散存储便于查看
entry.dc:creator: ScriptCat

entry.title: 抓老六 — 小德捡银子

entry.title: YouTube Download Helper / YouTube 下载助手 — 56826
entry.content: Send public YouTube videos, Shorts, and playlist entries to a local download helper.

entry.title: Host Extractor UI (可视化域名抓取) — zephyr-cn

entry.content: 自动推进学习通任务点、播放视频，并根据用户导入的本地题库填写页面题目

entry.content: Adds star history chart to sidebar of GitHub repos

entry.title: GLaDOS 自动签到（脚本猫） — Walvez
entry.content: 在脚本猫后台定时签到，通知展示账号、积分与剩余天数；无需复制 Cookie，也无需保持网页打开。

entry.title: ScriptCat 1.4.0 (2026-06-26)
entry.content: 🚀 Major New Features; 🧪 ScriptCat AI Agent ( Preview — available in dev / Beta builds only, not yet enabled in stable ) — AI-powered agent system with conversational interaction, tool calling, Skill system, MCP protocol, and more ( #1324 ) (by @CodFrm); ✨ Support the @unwrap metadata tag ( #1213 ) (by @cyfung1031); ✨ Implement TM's window.onurlchange via the Navigation API ( #1315 ) (by @cyfung1031); ✨ Restore @run-at context-menu support ( #1442 ) (by @cyfung1031)
entry.dc:creator: ScriptCat Changelog

entry.title: BananaTree — A zero-storage management hub for your userscripts
entry.content: BananaTree — A zero-storage management hub for your userscripts
entry.dc:creator: Violentmonkey

entry.title: Greasemonkey 4.14 release
entry.content: The entire list of bugs handled in this release is also available via the 4.14 milestone on GitHub. If you are using this version and notice problems, it's best to let us know at greasemonkey-users (and be clear that it's with this version). New features: When making a new user script, it will include a @match for the current page. ( #3231 ) Thank you community member Cerberus-tm! Several new features in the built in script editor, most optional (enabled by default). ( #3230 ) Improved user int
entry.dc:creator: Greasespot

entry.title: ScriptCat 0.16.15 (2026-05-19)
entry.content: 🐛 Bug Fixes; 🐛 Fix MV2 packaging script build command #1423 (by @CodFrm); 🐛 Adapt to WebExtensions API Changes (Firefox 149-152), including CSP adjustments ( #1448 ) (by @cyfung1031)
entry.dc:creator: ScriptCat Changelog

entry.title: Tampermonkey 5.5.0
entry.content: Injecting a userscript now requires a special extension permission. You can find instructions on how to enable this permission here . Chrome Added support for opening a local userscript file and tracking its changes on disk to speed up development Workarounded an issue where repeated GM_xmlhttpRequest s filled the browser's filtered_service_worker_events list with empty entries Speed up recognition of the Allow User Scripts option being enabled Any save or download now prompts for the optional d
entry.dc:creator: Tampermonkey

entry.title: ScriptCat 0.16.14 (2026-04-26)
entry.content: 🚀 Major New Features; ✨ FirefoxMV2 sync with MV3 main items: TypeScript upgraded to 4.9, tsconfig upgraded to es2022; script templates (normal/crontab/background) aligned with MV3; cron upgraded with once(...) expression support; Monaco Editor multi-language support ( #1331 ) (by @cyfung1031); ♻️ Refactoring & Compatibility; 🔥 Removed axios dependency to align with MV3 ( #1339 ) (by @cyfung1031); 🐛 Bug Fixes
entry.dc:creator: ScriptCat Changelog

entry.title: ScriptCat 1.3.2 (2026-03-28)
entry.content: 🐛 Bug Fixes; 🐛 Remove Accept header from fetchScriptBody to avoid Error 406 ( #1306 ) (by @cyfung1031); 🐛 Fix WebDAV cookies authentication conflict and authType support ( #1308 ) (by @CodFrm); 🐛 Correctly display formatting errors ( #1310 ) (by @cyfung1031); 🐛 Use chrome.storage.local for device-specific configs to avoid cross-device sync ( #1309 ) (by @CodFrm); 🐛 Fix code editor hint issues ( #1301 ) (by @cyfung1031)
entry.dc:creator: ScriptCat Changelog

entry.title: ScriptCat 1.3.1 (2026-03-13)
entry.content: 🐛 Bug Fixes; 🚑 Fix environment detection error caused by other extensions injecting chrome.runtime #1280 ( #1281 ) (by @CodFrm); Others; ✅ Add Playwright E2E tests and GM API functional tests ( #1283 ) (by @CodFrm)
entry.dc:creator: ScriptCat Changelog

entry.title: ScriptCat 1.3.0 (2026-03-10)
entry.content: 🚀 Major New Features; ✨ Add Amazon S3 storage #1146 ( #1189 ) (by @CodFrm); ✨ Script runtime options ( #895 ) (by @CodFrm); ✨ Install without external website access + install page layout adjustments ( #842 ) (by @cyfung1031); ✨ Show gray icon when script functionality is disabled #897 (by @CodFrm); ✨ Optimize interaction when menu expanded items count is 0 #868 (by @CodFrm); ✨ Default @noframes in template to prevent common mistakes ( #900 ) (by @cyfung1031)
entry.dc:creator: ScriptCat Changelog

entry.title: ScriptCat 1.2.6 (2026-02-03)
entry.content: Fixed; 🐛 Fix structuredClone error ( #1192 ) [ 265e122 ] (by @cyfung1031)
entry.dc:creator: ScriptCat Changelog

entry.title: ScriptCat 1.2.5 (2026-02-02)
entry.content: Fixed; 🐛 Fix script sync deletion issue #1158 [ 5e91a31 ] (by @CodFrm); 🐛 Compatible with TM `@match www.website.com/*&#x60 ; ( #1165 ) [ da66ff7 ] (by @cyfung1031); 🐛 Edge latest version 144 adds allow user scripts #1157 [ f7c1c73 ] (by @CodFrm); 🐛 Fix FileSystemObserver continuous monitoring issue ( #1160 ) [ 9556769 ] (by @cyfung1031); 🐛 locales.ts minor fixes ( #1154 ) [ 1c44b68 ] (by @cyfung1031); 🐛 Fix popup update window time issue ( #1155 ) [ c17f761 ] (by @cyfung1031)
entry.dc:creator: ScriptCat Changelog

entry.title: ScriptCat 1.2.4 (2026-01-07)
entry.content: Added; ✨ Sync deletion is now disabled by default ( #958 ) [ 9c4c7dc ] (by @cyfung1031); ✨ Editor now supports GM.* ( #1129 ) [ bea0192 ] (by @cyfung1031); Changed; ♻️ Optimize changelog page opening logic #1110 [ d3ffedc ] (by @CodFrm); Fixed; 🐛 scriptcat.d.tpl & type fixes ( #1130 ) [ dd22ef5 ] (by @cyfung1031); 🐛 Fix cloud sync issues ( #1133 ) [ a9383d2 ] (by @CodFrm); 🐛 Fix `GM_addElement("tagName")` error ( #1120 ) [ ad19de5 ] (by @cyfung1031)
entry.dc:creator: ScriptCat Changelog

entry.title: ScriptCat 1.2.3 (2025-12-20)
entry.content: Changed; ⚡ Optimize next run time display #1093 [ 324ce51 ] (by @CodFrm); Fixed; 🐛 Fix URL matching issue for early scripts ( #1096 ) [ a77effb ] (by @CodFrm); 🐛 Fix issue with update popup window displaying too briefly ( #1088 ) [ b2b2d5c ] (by @cyfung1031); 🐛 Fix abnormal display when userscript notification is enabled ( #1086 ) ( 959c4db ); 🐛 responseHeaders: `TM compatibility: \r\n` ( #1085 ) [ 15232c8 ] (by @cyfung1031)
entry.dc:creator: ScriptCat Changelog

entry.title: ScriptCat 1.2.2 (2025-12-13)
entry.content: Fixed; 🐛 Fix frequent background synchronization issue ( #1076 ) [ 45dc39b ] (by @CodFrm); 🐛 Fix special tab handling issue #1066 ( 50904fb ); 🐛 Fix script handling without match rules #1071 ( 560cdc0 ); 🐛 Fix CI packaging issue that removed background optional permissions [ 1f002f0 ] (by @CodFrm); 🐛 Fix ignore discarded tab ( #1058 ) [ 6165bf4 ] (by @cyfung1031)
entry.dc:creator: ScriptCat Changelog

entry.title: ScriptCat 1.2.1 (2025-12-06)
entry.content: Added; ✨ Add background running option ( #1048 ) [ 626e84d ] (by @CodFrm); Fixed; 🐛 Fix message listener reset issue caused by document.write ( #1055 ) [ 1f3a3ec ] (by @CodFrm); 🐛 Fix list view filtering functionality [ e272dc6 ] (by @CodFrm); 🐛 Handle UserAgentData in early phase ( #1045 ) [ b4e08a8 ] (by @CodFrm); 🐛 Restore useOpen option for GM_openInTab #1043 ( #1044 ) [ 7f30198 ] (by @cyfung1031); 🐛 Fix userScripts undefined issue ( #1041 ) [ 4f2deda ] (by @cyfung1031)
entry.dc:creator: ScriptCat Changelog

entry.title: ScriptCat 1.2.0 (2025-11-29)
entry.content: 🚀 Major New Features; ✨ Script list sidebar #794 (by @CodFrm); ✨ Card view #860 (by @CodFrm); ✨ Friendlier update check logic #755 (by @cyfung1031); ✨ Add editor configuration and editor type definitions #708 (by @CodFrm); ✨ Show script count in popup ( #973 ) [ 1134586 ] (by @cyfung1031); ✨ Add layout menu to hide code sidebar #689 [ dd64da7 ]; ✨ Add SC version check button ( #795 ) [ 1680c66 ] (by @cyfung1031)
entry.dc:creator: ScriptCat Changelog

entry.title: Tampermonkey 5.4.1
entry.content: General Fixed setting relative paths via window.location Fixed GM_xmlhttpRequest to allow sending FormData objects with duplicate keys UI Improved script installation and import Allow script storage editor to be saved using ctrl+s Fixed some issue with the script update column Locales Greek translation updated | thanks panos78
entry.dc:creator: Tampermonkey

entry.title: ScriptCat 1.1.2 (2025-09-18)
entry.content: Fixed; 🐛 Fix sandbox toString issue #737 [ 6ca24c9 ]; 🐛 Fix badge displaying 0 issue [ 026c1d2 ]; 🐛 Fix script injection CSP issue #739 #728 [ 5da21b5 ]; 🐛 Fix background script not expanding in popup page [ 66ab70f ]; 🐛 Enhance message type validation #676 [ 5073795 ]; 🐛 Fix GM xhr document issue #716 [ 1c46546 ]
entry.dc:creator: ScriptCat Changelog

entry.title: Tampermonkey 5.4.0
entry.content: General Added Blob and File download capabilities to GM_download Added support for sending ArrayBuffer and UInt8Array objects via GM_xmlhttpRequest Added the $DATETIME$ variable for use in script templates Fixed intermittent missing progress events for GM_download and GM_xmlhttpRequest Fixed response text encoding of fetch-based, non-utf8 GM_xmlhttpRequest Reworked the storage implementation Reworked the sandbox console
entry.dc:creator: Tampermonkey

entry.title: ScriptCat 1.1.0 (2025-09-07)
entry.content: Added; ✨ Add script runtime environment settings #628 [ 0d4a89e ]; ✨ Collapse by default when there are no background scripts #626 ( 9d0aac6 ); ✨ Support Dropbox #575 [ 2c66f21 ]; ✨ Optimize external.Tampermonkey to check SC installation status when TM is not installed but both TM and SC are enabled ( #703 ) [ d0115c3 ] (by @cyfung1031); ✨ Add @early-start to load faster than the page ( #649 ) [ eb097dd ]; ✨ Global code search ( #662 ) [ f8eafb7 ] (by @RenjiYuusei)
entry.dc:creator: ScriptCat Changelog

entry.title: ScriptCat 1.1.1 (2025-09-07)
entry.content: Added; ✨ Add custom editor configuration and editor type definitions ( #708 ) [ 49eb379 ]; Fixed; 🐛 Fix compatibility issues with older browser versions #715 [ 4da8068 ]; 💄 Optimize popup menu display when popup window is too small ( 288650e ); 🐛 Fix multiple issues ( #710 ) [ 6a2027a ] (by @WhiteSevs); Miscellaneous; 🌐 Handle i18n issues [ 2adf69d ]
entry.dc:creator: ScriptCat Changelog

entry.title: Greasemonkey 4.13 release
entry.content: The entire list of bugs handled in this release is also available via the 4.13 milestone on GitHub. If you are using this version and notice problems, it's best to let us know at greasemonkey-users (and be clear that it's with this version). New features: GM.openInTab() now works in Firefox for Android. ( #3189 ) Fixed bugs: Importing a backup could fail when "overwrite already installed scripts" (enabled by default) was disabled. ( #3195 ) Previously unreliable automatic script updates should
entry.dc:creator: Greasespot

entry.title: Greasemonkey 4.12 Release
entry.content: The entire list of bugs handled in this release is also available via the 4.12 milestone on GitHub. If you are using this version and notice problems, it's best to let us know at greasemonkey-dev (and be clear that it's with this version). New features: Ability to edit text @resource files. ( #2733 ) Support for Firefox on Android. ( #3173 ) Fixed bugs: Code highlighting for newer Javascript features. ( #3115 ) An invalid user @match could break opening the monkey menu. ( #3171 ) Add a scroll
entry.dc:creator: Greasespot

entry.title: Features in Userscript Generator
entry.content: Features in Userscript Generator
entry.dc:creator: Violentmonkey

entry.title: Violentmonkey Workflows
entry.content: Violentmonkey Workflows
entry.dc:creator: Violentmonkey

entry.title: Greasemonkey 4.11 Release
entry.content: The entire list of bugs handled in this release is also available via the 4.11 milestone on GitHub. If you are using this version and notice problems, it's best to let us know at greasemonkey-dev (and be clear that it's with this version). New features: Support translation for @name and @description of user scripts. ( #3089 ) First party support for GM.registerMenuCommand . ( #3078 )
entry.dc:creator: Greasespot

entry.title: Greasemonkey 4.10 Release
entry.content: The entire list of bugs handled in this release is also available via the 4.10 milestone on GitHub. (Due to a small human error (and the fact that they don't let you re-use version numbers), the version available from addons.mozilla.org is called "4.10.0" -- this is the same version.) If you are using this version and notice problems, it's best to let us know at greasemonkey-dev (and be clear that it's with this version). New features: Accessibility enhancements: Appropriate metadata for and a
entry.dc:creator: Greasespot

entry.title: Greasemonkey 4.9 Release
entry.content: The entire list of bugs handled in this release is also available via the 4.9 milestone on GitHub. If you are using this version and notice problems, it's best to let us know at greasemonkey-dev (and be clear that it's with this version). Fixed bugs: Error handling scripts with certain names (bug added in v4.8). ( #3035 )
entry.dc:creator: Greasespot

entry.title: Greasemonkey 4.8 Release
entry.content: The entire list of bugs handled in this release is also available via the 4.8 milestone on GitHub. If you are using this version and notice problems, it's best to let us know at greasemonkey-dev (and be clear that it's with this version). Fixed bugs: Don't re-enable scripts when saving in editor. ( #3008 ) "New user script" doesn't open a new tab. ( #2994 ) Log err.message instead of <unavailable> err object. ( #2939 )
entry.dc:creator: Greasespot

entry.title: Inject scripts into different contexts
entry.content: Inject scripts into different contexts
entry.dc:creator: Violentmonkey

entry.title: Greasemonkey 4.7 Release
entry.content: The entire list of bugs handled in this release is also available via the 4.6 milestone on GitHub. If you are using this version and notice problems, it's best to let us know at greasemonkey-dev (and be clear that it's with this version). New features: Automatic update support ( #2531 ) Per-user include/exclude/match settings ( #2728 ) Warning! For the first time, automatic updates will destroy local edits made since install time. After that point, we track both install time and edit time and
entry.dc:creator: Greasespot

entry.title: Greasemonkey 4.6 Release
entry.content: The entire list of bugs handled in this release is also available via the 4.6 milestone on GitHub. If you are using this version and notice problems, it's best to let us know at greasemonkey-dev (and be clear that it's with this version). Fixed bugs: Repair GM.xmlHttpRequest() when fetching XML content. ( #2980 ) New features: Added translations in several languages. Users may specify global exclude patterns, where no user scripts will run. ( #2843 )
entry.dc:creator: Greasespot

entry.title: Greasemonkey 4.5 Release
entry.content: The entire list of bugs handled in this release is also available via the 4.5 milestone on GitHub. If you are using this version and notice problems, it's best to let us know at greasemonkey-dev (and be clear that it's with this version). Fixed bugs: Better importing of partial or corrupted backups. ( #2966 ) Correctly display script data when switching from one to another. ( #2963 ) Correctly display uninstallation of even the last script. ( #2957 ) Correctly handle removal of an @icon from a
entry.dc:creator: Greasespot

entry.title: Help Translate Greasemonkey Into Your Language
entry.content: Since our complete WebExtension rewrite, Greasemonkey has been available in only a few languages. Currently: English, Dutch, French, German, and Japanese. If you speak any additional language fluently, feel free to join our Crowdin project and submit translations for that language. We'll be happy for the contribution!
entry.dc:creator: Greasespot

entry.title: Greasemonkey 4.4 Release
entry.content: The entire list of bugs handled in this release is also available via the 4.4 milestone on GitHub. If you are using this version and notice problems, it's best to let us know at greasemonkey-dev (and be clear that it's with this version). Fixed bugs: Scripts with icons or resources could sometimes fail to save, including when only the enabled/disabled status changes. ( #2909 , #2943 ) New features: Script editor will prompt, when closing with unsaved edits. ( #2886 ) Support for backup and rest
entry.dc:creator: Greasespot

entry.title: Greasemonkey 4.3 Release
entry.content: The entire list of bugs handled in this release is also available via the 4.3 milestone on GitHub. If you are using this version and notice problems, it's best to let us know at greasemonkey-dev (and be clear that it's with this version). Fixed bugs: The open_in_background feature of GM.openInTab() works correctly. ( #2672 ) Installation of user scripts works even from sites with strict Content Security Policies, like GitHub. ( #2631 ) New features: Even "forbidden" headers (e.g. Cookie, Host,
entry.dc:creator: Greasespot

entry.title: Greasemonkey 4.2 Release
entry.content: The entire list of bugs handled in this release is also available via the 4.2 milestone on GitHub. If you are using this version and notice problems, it's best to let us know at greasemonkey-dev (and be clear that it's with this version). Fixed bugs: Use of the magic TLD is now reflected correctly in the monkey menu user script list. ( #2795 ) Privileged API handlers will now refuse to continue without the appropriate @grant entry. ( #2777 ) Native xmlHttpRequest now handles URLs relative to th
entry.dc:creator: Greasespot

entry.title: Greasemonkey 4.1 Release
entry.content: The entire list of bugs handled in this release is also available via the 4.1 milestone on GitHub. If you are using this version and notice problems, it's best to let us know at greasemonkey-dev or log an issue (and be clear that it's with this version). Fixed bugs: For GM.xmlHttpRequest, set the finalURL ( #2692 ) and support onprogress ( #2712 ). Update @match handling to be consistent with pre-existing behavior. ( #2673 , #2715 ) Handle user scripts that end with a comment. ( #2670 ) Fix ch
entry.dc:creator: Greasespot

entry.title: Inject scripts with Blob URLs
entry.content: Inject scripts with Blob URLs
entry.dc:creator: Violentmonkey

entry.title: Greasemonkey 4 Announcement
entry.content: Greasemonkey has been a Firefox extension for well over a decade, with version 0.3.5 dating from 2005. We've grown and changed a lot over that time. With the upcoming Firefox 57 release , we need to change even more. Mozilla is completely replacing the extension system in Firefox, to align with the budding Browser Extension standard, based on/shared with Google Chrome. As a result, version 4 of Greasemonkey is a nearly complete re-write. Its interface and feature set have been rebuilt in ord
entry.dc:creator: Greasespot

entry.title: Greasemonkey 4 For Script Authors
entry.content: As mentioned in the main post , Greasemonkey 4 is changing to be compatible with the Browser Extension API. At its core, this set of APIs is completely asynchronous. Greasemonkey's old " GM_ " APIs are typically synchronous. Why? There exist other user script engines which have already done the work of bridging the gap. Greasemonkey has elected to move exclusively towards a more performant asynchronous model. Eventually in the future, such scripts will be faster. What? The Greasespot Wiki ha
entry.dc:creator: Greasespot

entry.title: Greasemonkey 4 For Users
entry.content: As mentioned in the main post , Greasemonkey 4 is changing how it runs user scripts. Many user scripts will continue to run as expected, but this will break some scripts. If you rely on such scripts, you might want to install Violentmonkey or Tampermonkey , both of which provide better compatibility for existing scripts. Scripts If you'd prefer to stick with Greasemonkey, you'll need to wait for the script to be updated to be compatible. Find the original author of your script, and ask them t
entry.dc:creator: Greasespot

entry.title: Greasemonkey 3.12 Release
entry.content: The entire list of bugs handled in this release is also available via the 3.12 milestone on GitHub. Note that as always it takes some time for Mozilla to review the new version. If you're interested in staying on the bleeding edge, try installing the development channel beta release. If you are using this version and notice problems, it's best to log an issue or let us know at greasemonkey-dev (and be clear that it's with this version). Fixed bugs: Repair rare breakage in GM_getValue / GM_s
entry.dc:creator: Greasespot

entry.title: Greasemonkey 3.11 Release
entry.content: The entire list of bugs handled in this release is also available via the 3.10 milestone on GitHub. Note that as always it takes some time for Mozilla to review the new version. If you're interested in staying on the bleeding edge, try installing the development channel beta release. If you are using this version and notice problems, it's best to log an issue or let us know at greasemonkey-dev (and be clear that it's with this version). Fixed bugs: Repair broken language check. ( #2488 ) Co
entry.dc:creator: Greasespot
